channel.title: Productivity on Satish Iyer's Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Productivity on Satish Iyer's Tech Blog

item.title: Terminal Program to Find Disk Usage Ncdu
item.description: ncdu is a beautiful @terminal ncurses program to find disk usage.If you need to check the usage of a particular folder the command is ncdu -x /home. Another option in @golang for the same functionality is gdu. Faster abd more colorful.

item.title: mimeopen
item.description: A few years back I had learnt about Mimeopen and other mime related stuff. It is very powerful and works well if we understand the underlying stuff.

item.title: Zoho
item.description: Zoho is comming up as the best productivity suite. It is an upgrade of the Google suites that I was using till now. The question however is will I be able to switch to it totally?
